requirement_topic.en: KLHK ODS/HFC phase-down controls for refrigerants
requirement_topic.zh: KLHK氟氯化碳管理下的ODS/HFC逐步减量要求

summary.en: KLHK applies refrigerant management tied to ODS/HFC controls for import and in-market operation. Indonesia-specific handling includes refrigerant phase-down planning, reporting and control practices that align with national implementation pathways. R-22 is subject to phase-down transition constraints and legacy import/product controls must be verified per model and charge level.
summary.zh: KLHK执行与ODS/HFC相关的制冷剂管理要求，涉及进口和市场投放。印度尼西亚要求按本土实施路径进行R-22的逐步淘汰控制，并按机型与充注量核验相关进口和销售限制。
summary.zht: KLHK執行與ODS/HFC相關的製冷劑管理要求，涉及進口和市場投放。印度尼西亞要求按本土實施路徑進行R-22的逐步淘汰控制，並按機型與充注量核驗相關進口和銷售限制。

standards_or_laws: KLHK import and import-equipment refrigerant guidance

summary.en: China participates in global ODS/HFC reduction frameworks and applies refrigerant standards including GB safety and labeling norms, but product-level administrative licensing and enforcement sequences are not identical for Indonesian imports.
summary.zh: 中国参与全球ODS/HFC削减框架并有GB体系下制冷剂安全和标识要求，但产品级行政许可及执行序列与印尼进口控制并不一致。
summary.zht: 中國參與全球ODS/HFC削減框架並有GB體系下製冷劑安全和標識要求，但產品級行政許可及執行序列與印尼進口控制並不一致。

gap.en: For Indonesian-bound models, relying solely on Chinese refrigerant test reports is risky. Import teams should separately confirm KLHK expectations for refrigerant class, charge declaration, and phase-down compliance status.
gap.zh: 对于印度尼西亚市场机型，仅依赖中国制冷剂测试文件不足。需单独确认KLHK对制冷剂种类、充注量申报和逐步淘汰合规状态的要求。
gap.zht: 對於印度尼西亞市場機型，僅依賴中國製冷劑測試文件不足。需單獨確認KLHK對製冷劑種類、充注量申報和逐步淘汰合規狀態的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where KLHK ODS/HFC licensing or declaration applies to the imported model
mandatory_status.cn: Policy-controlled under China ODS/HFC paths; administrative structure and evidence not equivalent

source.publisher: Ministry of Environment and Forestry (KLHK), Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Refrigerant controls are likely a binding gap until KLHK product-level and model-level status is confirmed for each shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 制冷剂管控很可能是约束性差距，必须对每批机型确认KLHK级别的产品及型号要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 製冷劑管制很可能是約束性差距，必須對每批機型確認KLHK級別的產品及型號要求。

summary.en: Indonesia follows refrigerant transition direction where lower-GWP pathways are increasingly embedded in policy and import assessment. Products using R-32 or R-410A should be assessed against current transition guidance, product safety documentation, and any local labeling or registration additions requested by KLHK or associated agencies.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚逐步向低GWP方向过渡，进而影响进口评估与政策执行。采用R-32或R-410A的产品应结合当前转型指引确认合规，包括安全文件和可能新增的标签或登记事项。
summary.zht: 印度尼西亞逐步向低GWP方向過渡，進而影響進口評估與政策執行。採用R-32或R-410A的產品應結合當前轉型指引確認合規，包括安全文件和可能新增的標籤或登記事項。

standards_or_laws: KLHK refrigerant transition and compliance updates
KLHK product documentation and import screening

summary.en: China also manages refrigerant phase-down through related ODS/HFC pathways and has technical transition practices, but Indonesia’s local transition checkpoints and required declarations are implemented through its own administrative stack.
summary.zh: 中国也通过ODS/HFC路径和技术迁移措施进行制冷剂减量管理，但印度尼西亚采用独立行政框架，过渡检查点与申报要求具有地方化执行要素。
summary.zht: 中國也透過ODS/HFC路徑和技術遷移措施進行製冷劑減量管理，但印度尼西亞採用獨立行政框架，過渡檢查點與申報要求具有地方化執行要素。

gap.en: Exporters should avoid assuming a one-to-one mapping between Chinese refrigerant planning and Indonesian acceptance. R-22 legacy stock, conversion kits, and service obligations should be reviewed against Indonesian transition logic.
gap.zh: 出口商不应假设中印制冷剂管理完全等同。R-22库存、改装套件和售后义务应按印度尼西亚转型逻辑单独复核。
gap.zht: 出口商不應假設中印製冷劑管理完全等同。R-22庫存、改裝套件和售後義務應按印度尼西亞轉型邏輯單獨複核。

mandatory_status.target: Expected to be mandatory where KLHK transition screening includes imported air-source heat pump models
mandatory_status.cn: China has related refrigerant controls but with different transition administration and evidentiary scope

source.publisher: Ministry of Environment and Forestry (KLHK), Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No automatic equivalence is assumed for refrigerant transition status; KLHK transition documentation should be verified per model and refrigerant charge level before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不假定制冷剂转型状态可自动互认；出货前应按机型和充注量核对KLHK转型文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不假定製冷劑轉型狀態可自動互認；出貨前應按機型和充注量核對KLHK轉型文件。
